executives.name: Nichelle Maynard-Elliott
executives.background: Ms. Maynard-Elliott has served as a director since 2021. She previously served as Executive Director, M&A at Praxair, Inc. She also serves on the boards of Xerox Holdings Corporation and Element Solutions Inc.
